---
title: "7. Phenomic prediction models"
author: "sss322"
date: "2025-02-07"
output: html_document
---



```{r}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, eval = FALSE)
```




# **1. Import dependencies and data **


**Import dependencies**

```{r}
library(MASS)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(caret)
library(glmnet)
#library(asreml)
library(ggplot2)
library(readr)
library(stringr)
```


**Import data**

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
base_path <- if (.Platform$OS.type == "windows") {
  "C:/Users/Siim Sepp/Predicting_WMB_for_NY"
} else {
  "~/Documents/GitHub/Predicting_WMB_for_NY"
}

load(file.path(base_path, "data/data_ag.Rdata"))
load(file.path(base_path, "data/data_mq.Rdata"))
load(file.path(base_path, "data/VImat.Rdata"))
```




# **2. Predict traits with rf, lm, glm and pcr **



**Write the function**

```{r}
run_pheno_models_long <- function(data_long, VImats, model_list = c("rf", "lm", "glmnet", "pcr"), cycles = 50) {


  VIs <- setdiff(names(VImats[[1]]), "plot_id")

  #storage
  accuracy_list <- list()
  var_importance_list <- list()
  prediction_list <- list()

  acc_idx <- varimp_idx <- pred_idx <- 1

  for (env_idx in names(VImats)) {
    for (trait_name in unique(data_long$VI)) {

      response_data <- data_long %>%
        filter(Env == env_idx, VI == trait_name)

      for (p in VIs) {

        predictor_data <- VImats[[env_idx]][[p]]

        merged_data <- inner_join(response_data, predictor_data, by = "plot_id") %>%
          rename(S.T = Predicted) %>%
          na.omit()

        cols <- c("S.T", colnames(predictor_data)[-1])
        cols <- cols[cols %in% colnames(merged_data)]
        merged_data <- merged_data[, cols]

        for (r in 1:cycles) {
          set.seed(r)

          ind <- createDataPartition(merged_data$S.T, p = 0.8, list = FALSE)
          train <- merged_data[ind, ]
          test  <- merged_data[-ind, ]

          nzv <- nearZeroVar(train, saveMetrics = TRUE)
          train <- train[, !nzv$nzv]
          test  <- test[, colnames(train)]

          if (ncol(train) <= 1) next

          custom <- trainControl(method = "repeatedcv", number = 5, repeats = 1)

          for (model_type in model_list) {
            if (model_type == "glmnet") {
              for (alpha_val in c(0, 0.5, 1)) {
                model <- tryCatch(train(S.T ~ ., data = train, method = "glmnet",
                                        tuneGrid = expand.grid(alpha = alpha_val, lambda = seq(0.0001, 1, length = 10)),
                                        trControl = custom), error = function(e) NULL)
                if (!is.null(model)) {
                  model_pred <- predict(model, test)
                  model_acc <- cor(model_pred, test$S.T, use = "complete.obs")

                  model_name <- c("0" = "Ridge", "0.5" = "ElasticNet", "1" = "Lasso")[as.character(alpha_val)]

                  accuracy_list[[acc_idx]] <- data.frame(Environment = env_idx, Cycle = r,
                                                         Trait = trait_name, Predictor_Set = p,
                                                         Model = model_name, Accuracy = model_acc)
                  acc_idx <- acc_idx + 1

                  prediction_list[[pred_idx]] <- data.frame(Environment = env_idx, Cycle = r,
                                                            Trait = trait_name, Predictor_Set = p,
                                                            Model = model_name, True = test$S.T,
                                                            Predicted = model_pred)
                  pred_idx <- pred_idx + 1

                  varimp <- tryCatch(varImp(model)$importance, error = function(e) NULL)
                  if (!is.null(varimp)) {
                    var_importance_list[[varimp_idx]] <- data.frame(Environment = env_idx, Cycle = r,
                                                                    Trait = trait_name, Predictor_Set = p,
                                                                    Model = model_name,
                                                                    Predictor = rownames(varimp),
                                                                    Importance = varimp$Overall)
                    varimp_idx <- varimp_idx + 1
                  }
                }
              }
            } else {
              if (model_type == "pcr" && nrow(train) <= (ncol(train) - 1)) next
              model <- tryCatch(train(S.T ~ ., data = train, method = model_type, trControl = custom), error = function(e) NULL)
              if (!is.null(model)) {
                model_pred <- predict(model, test)
                model_acc <- cor(model_pred, test$S.T, use = "complete.obs")

                model_name <- c("rf" = "Random Forest", "lm" = "Linear Regression", "pcr" = "PCR")[model_type]

                accuracy_list[[acc_idx]] <- data.frame(Environment = env_idx, Cycle = r,
                                                       Trait = trait_name, Predictor_Set = p,
                                                       Model = model_name, Accuracy = model_acc)
                acc_idx <- acc_idx + 1

                prediction_list[[pred_idx]] <- data.frame(Environment = env_idx, Cycle = r,
                                                          Trait = trait_name, Predictor_Set = p,
                                                          Model = model_name, True = test$S.T,
                                                          Predicted = model_pred)
                pred_idx <- pred_idx + 1

                if (model_type %in% c("rf", "lm")) {
                  varimp <- tryCatch(varImp(model)$importance, error = function(e) NULL)
                  if (!is.null(varimp)) {
                    var_importance_list[[varimp_idx]] <- data.frame(Environment = env_idx, Cycle = r,
                                                                    Trait = trait_name, Predictor_Set = p,
                                                                    Model = model_name,
                                                                    Predictor = rownames(varimp),
                                                                    Importance = varimp$Overall)
                    varimp_idx <- varimp_idx + 1
                  }
                } else if (model_type == "pcr") {
                  var_importance_list[[varimp_idx]] <- data.frame(Environment = env_idx, Cycle = r,
                                                                  Trait = trait_name, Predictor_Set = p,
                                                                  Model = model_name,
                                                                  Predictor = NA, Importance = NA)
                  varimp_idx <- varimp_idx + 1
                }
              }
            }
          }
        }
      }
    }
  }

  return(list(
    accuracy = do.call(rbind, accuracy_list),
    importance = do.call(rbind, var_importance_list),
    predictions = do.call(rbind, prediction_list)
  ))
}

```




**Prepare phenotype data**
```{r}
#prepare agronomic traits
traits_ag<- colnames(data_ag)[7:8]
data_ag<- data_ag %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = all_of(traits_ag), names_to = "VI", values_to = "Predicted")

#prepare malt quality traits
traits_mq<- colnames(data_mq)[4:15]
data_mq<- data_mq%>%
  pivot_longer(cols = all_of(traits_mq), names_to = "VI", values_to = "Predicted")
```




**Run the predicton for agronomic traits RAW**

```{r}
PP_LM_results_ag_raw  <- run_pheno_models_long(data_ag, VImats, model_list = c("rf", "lm", "glmnet", "pcr"), cycles = 5)

#hist(PP_LM_results_ag_raw$accuracy$Accuracy)
save(PP_LM_results_ag_raw, file= file.path(base_path, "output/PP_LM_results_ag_raw.Rdata"))
#table(PP_LM_results_ag_raw$accuracy$Environment, PP_LM_results_ag_raw$accuracy$Trait)
#boxplot(PP_LM_results_ag_raw$accuracy$Accuracy~ PP_LM_results_ag_raw$accuracy$Trait)
```




**Run the predicton for MQ traits RAW**

```{r}
PP_LM_results_mq_raw  <- run_pheno_models_long(data_mq, VImats[c(1,3)], model_list = c("rf", "lm", "glmnet", "pcr"), cycles = 50)

save(PP_LM_results_mq_raw, file= file.path(base_path, "output/PP_LM_results_mq_raw.Rdata"))
```



## **Results: Phenomic prediction accuracy**

```{r, eval=TRUE}
base_path <- if (.Platform$OS.type == "windows") {
  "C:/Users/Siim Sepp/Predicting_WMB_for_NY"
} else {
  "~/Documents/GitHub/Predicting_WMB_for_NY"
}
library(dplyr)
load(file.path(base_path, "output/PP_LM_results_ag_raw.Rdata"))
load(file.path(base_path, "output/PP_LM_results_mq_raw.Rdata"))

ag_sum <- PP_LM_results_ag_raw$accuracy %>%
  group_by(Trait) %>%
  summarise(mean_r = round(mean(Accuracy, na.rm=TRUE), 3),
            sd_r   = round(sd(Accuracy,   na.rm=TRUE), 3), .groups="drop") %>%
  arrange(desc(mean_r))

mq_sum <- PP_LM_results_mq_raw$accuracy %>%
  group_by(Trait) %>%
  summarise(mean_r = round(mean(Accuracy, na.rm=TRUE), 3),
            sd_r   = round(sd(Accuracy,   na.rm=TRUE), 3), .groups="drop") %>%
  arrange(desc(mean_r))

cat("Agronomic (BLUE) — mean CV accuracy by trait:\n"); print(ag_sum)
cat("\nMalt quality (raw) — mean CV accuracy by trait:\n"); print(mq_sum)
```
